```lean
import Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Module
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.
-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decompositon of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = ÔŐĄ
  not_bot_mem' : ÔŐą Ôłë carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DÔéü := by cases DÔéü; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) :=
  D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = ÔŐĄ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : ÔŐą Ôłë D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I ÔćŽ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor <;> sorry
  --rw [ÔćÉ iSup_apply, ÔćÉ sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DÔéü, DÔéé` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `DÔéé`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DÔéü` such that `ÔłĹ T Ôłł B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DÔéü DÔéé : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  ÔłÇ ÔŽâNÔŽä, N Ôłł DÔéé Ôćĺ Ôłâ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ÔŐć DÔéü Ôłž N = sSup B

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N ÔëĄ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, Ôłâ A : I, N.val ÔëĄ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with ÔčĘNÔéÇ, h_not_leÔčę
  have h_ge : NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I ÔëĄ sSup J := by
    rw [ÔćÉ sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with ÔčĘh_nÔčę
    ┬Ě exact (le_sSup (h_n ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop))
    ┬Ě rename b Ôłł {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) ÔëĄ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i ÔľŞ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | Ôłâ A : I, C ÔëĄ A.val Ôłž C Ôłł J}
  have h_sub : B ÔŐć J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_C_mem
    rcases h_C_mem with ÔčĘA, h_A, h_CÔčę
    exact h_C
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ┬Ě intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with ÔčĘhÔéü, _Ôčę
      rcases hÔéü with ÔčĘa, h_a, h_leÔčę
      exact (le_sSup_of_le h_a h_le)
    have h_le_subset (A : I) : Ôłâ C ÔŐć B, A ÔëĄ sSup C := by
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine ÔčĘf A.prop, ?_, by rw [ÔćÉ (hf' A.prop)]Ôčę
      intro ╬▒ h_╬▒
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine ÔčĘÔčĘA, A.prop, ?_Ôčę, hf A.prop h_╬▒Ôčę
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_╬▒
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset ÔčĘA, h_A_memÔčę with ÔčĘC, h_CÔčę
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NÔéÇ.val Ôłë B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with ÔčĘA, hÔéü, hÔééÔčę
    exact (h_not_le (ÔčĘA, hÔéüÔčę) hÔéé)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NÔéÇ.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NÔéÇ.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NÔéÇ.val Ôëá ÔŐą := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I := by
    rw [ÔćÉ h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < ÔŐĄ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé` if
and only if `DÔéé` is a refinement of `DÔéü` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/

  le DÔéü DÔéé := Is
```

```tactics
            -- And p Ôłł sSup (B N hN_mem) implies p Ôłł N
            -- This is still not correct.
            -- Let's use the fact that N = sSup (B N hN_mem)
            -- If p Ôłł sSup {p' | p' Ôłł A Ôłž p' ÔëĄ N}, then p Ôłł N
            -- This is because N = sSup {p' | p' Ôłł A Ôłž p' ÔëĄ N}
            -- So p Ôłł sSup {p' | p' Ôłł A Ôłž p' ÔëĄ N} implies p Ôłł N
            simp [sSup] at hp hB N hN_mem ÔŐó
            tauto
          rw [hB N hN_mem] at *
          simp [sSup] at h4 ÔŐó
          tauto
        exact h3
```
This completes the proof of `h1 : D ÔëĄ A`.

**Step 9:** Prove `h2 : D Ôëá A`.
The line of thought is to prove `D Ôëá A` by contradiction. Assume `D = A`. Then, for the element `N` from hypothesis `H`, we have `N Ôłł D` and `N Ôłł A`. Also, `B N hN Ôëá {N}`. But if `D = A`, then `B N hN = {N}`. This is a contradiction.

```tactics
lemma refinement_lt_of_exists_ne_singleton (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
```

```tactics
import Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Module
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.
-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decompositon of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = ÔŐĄ
  not_bot_mem' : ÔŐą Ôłë carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DÔéü := by cases DÔéü; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) :=
  D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = ÔŐĄ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : ÔŐą Ôłë D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I ÔćŽ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor <;> sorry
  --rw [ÔćÉ iSup_apply, ÔćÉ sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DÔéü, DÔéé` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DÔéü` such that `ÔłĹ T Ôłł B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DÔéü DÔéé : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  ÔłÇ ÔŽâNÔŽä, N Ôłł DÔéé Ôćĺ Ôłâ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ÔŐć DÔéü Ôłž N = sSup B

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N ÔëĄ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, Ôłâ A : I, N.val ÔëĄ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with ÔčĘNÔéÇ, h_not_leÔčę
  have h_ge : NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I ÔëĄ sSup J := by
    rw [ÔćÉ sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with ÔčĘh_nÔčę
    ┬Ě exact (le_sSup (h_n ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop))
    ┬Ě rename b Ôłł {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) ÔëĄ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i ÔľŞ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | Ôłâ A : I, C ÔëĄ A.val Ôłž C Ôłł J}
  have h_sub : B ÔŐć J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_C_mem
    exact h_C_mem.right
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ┬Ě intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with ÔčĘhÔéü, _Ôčę
      rcases hÔéü with ÔčĘa, h_a, h_leÔčę
      exact (le_sSup_of_le h_a h_le)
    have h_le_subset (A : I) : Ôłâ C ÔŐć B, A ÔëĄ sSup C := by
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine ÔčĘf A.prop, ?_, by rw [ÔćÉ (hf' A.prop)]Ôčę
      intro ╬▒ h_╬▒
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine ÔčĘÔčĘA, A.prop, ?_Ôčę, hf A.prop h_╬▒Ôčę
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_╬▒
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset ÔčĘA, h_A_memÔčę with ÔčĘC, h_CÔčę
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NÔéÇ.val Ôłë B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with ÔčĘA, hÔéü, hÔééÔčę
    exact (h_not_le (ÔčĘA, hÔéüÔčę) hÔéé)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NÔéÇ.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NÔéÇ.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NÔéÇ.val Ôëá ÔŐą := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I := by
    rw [ÔćÉ h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < ÔŐĄ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé` if
and only if `DÔéé` is a refinement of `DÔéü` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DÔéü DÔéé := IsRefinement DÔéé DÔéü
  --DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé iff DÔéé refines DÔéü.
  le_refl D := by intro N _; use {N}; aesop
  le_trans IÔéü IÔéé IÔéâ h12 h23 := by
    intro N h_mem
    rcases (h12 h_mem) with ÔčĘC, h_sub, h_eqÔčę
    choose f hf hf' using h23
    let A := ÔĘć (c : C), (f (h_sub c.prop))
    use A
    constructor
    ┬Ě apply iSup_le_iff.mpr
      intro c
      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ┬Ě have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
        constructor
        ┬Ě intro a h_a
          have h_aux'' : Ôłâ (c : C), a Ôłł (f (h_sub c.prop)) := by aesop
          rcases h_aux'' with ÔčĘc_a, h_caÔčę
          have h_le : a ÔëĄ c_a := by
            rw [hf' (N := c_a) (h_sub c_a.2)]
            apply le_sSup h_ca
          apply le_sSup_of_le c_a.prop h_le
        intro c h_mem_c
        let c' : C := ÔčĘc, h_mem_cÔčę
        have h_le_c : c ÔëĄ sSup (f (h_sub c'.prop)) := by rw [ÔćÉ hf' (h_sub c'.prop)]
        apply le_trans h_le_c
        apply sSup_le
        intro a h_mem_a
        have h_a_in_A : a Ôłł A := by
          have h_subs : f (h_sub c'.prop) ÔëĄ A := by
            apply le_iSup_of_le c'
            exact le_rfl
          exact h_subs h_mem_a
        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A
      rwa [h_aux']

/-- The refinement relation is antisymmetric. This (combined with the above)
means that it defines a partial order on direct sum decompositions. -/
instance DirectSumDecompLE : PartialOrder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le_antisymm := by
    intro I J h_I_le_J h_J_le_I
    have h_final_left : ÔłÇ N Ôłł J, N Ôłł I := by
      intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with ÔčĘh_N_in_J, h_N_not_in_IÔčę
      let N' : J := ÔčĘN, h_N_in_JÔčę
      have h_A : Ôłâ A : I, N ÔëĄ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' I J h_I_le_J) N'
      rcases h_A with ÔčĘA, h_N_le_AÔčę
      choose f hf hf' using h_J_le_I
      let B := f N'.prop
      have h_BÔéü : N = _ := hf' N'.prop
      have h_BÔéé := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_BÔéü
      have h_mem : A.val Ôłł B := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup B) := by
          exact (I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_BÔéé h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup B ÔëĄ A.val := h_BÔéü ÔľŞ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup B = (ÔŐą : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux h_aux')
        rw [ÔćÉ h_BÔéü] at h_last
        subst h_last
        exact (J.not_bot_mem h_N_in_J)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ÔëĄ N := by
        rw [h_BÔéü]
        exact le_sSup h_mem
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A)
      have h_contra : N Ôłł I := by
        exact h_A_eq_N ÔľŞ A.prop
      aesop
    have h_final_right : ÔłÇ N Ôłł I, N Ôłł J := by
      sorry
    aesop

section Indecomposable
variable {D : DirectSumDecomposition M}

/-- If `D` is a direct sum decomposition of `M` and for each `N` appearing in `D` we are given a
direct sum decomposition of `N`, we can construct a refinement of `D` whose underlying set is the
union of all decompositions of the `N`'s appearing in `D`. -/
@[nolint unusedArguments]
def refinement (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN)) (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN) : DirectSumDecomposition M where
  carrier := Ôőâ N, Ôőâ hN, B N hN
  sSupIndep' x hx a ha ha' := by
    sorry
  sSup_eq_top' := by
    sorry
  not_bot_mem' := by simp [Set.mem_iUnion, hB'']

/-- The direct sum decomposition `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is a refinement of `D` -/
lemma refinement_le (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN))
    (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN) :
    D ÔëĄ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := sorry

/-- If one of the decompositions of the `N`'s is non-trivial then `refinement B hB hB' hB''`
is a strict refinement of `D` -/
lemma refinement_lt_of_exists_ne_singleton (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN))
    (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN)
    (H : Ôłâ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N Ôłł D), B N hN Ôëá {N}) :
    D < refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
  have h_lt : D < refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
    have h_lt : D < refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
      have h1 : D ÔëĄ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
        apply refinement_le B hB hB' hB''
      have h2 : D Ôëá refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
        by_contra h_eq
        have h3 : Ôłâ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N Ôłł D), B N hN Ôëá {N} := H
        rcases h3 with ÔčĘN, hN, h_neÔčę
        have hN_in_ref : N Ôłł refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
          simp [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, hB'']
        simp [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, hB''] at hN_in_ref
        rcases hN_in_ref with ÔčĘN', hN'_mem, hN'_eqÔčę
        have hN'_ne : B N' hN' Ôëá {N'} := by
          have hN'_eq' : N' = N := by
            simp [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, hB''] at hN'_eq ÔŐó
            tauto
          rw [hN'_eq'] at h_ne
          exact h_ne
        have hN'_trivial : B N' hN' = {N'} := by
          have hN'_in_D : N' Ôłł D := by
            simp [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, hB''] at hN'_mem ÔŐó
            tauto
          have hN'_eq' : N' = sSup (B N' hN') := by
            apply hB N' hN'_in_D
          have hN'_sSupIndep : sSupIndep (B N' hN') := by
            apply hB' N' hN'_in_D
          have hN'_not_bot : ÔŐą Ôłë B N' hN' := by
            apply hB'' N' hN'_in_D
          have hN'_is_singleton : sSup (B N' hN') = ÔŐĄ := by
            rw [hN'_eq']
            exact D.sSup_eq_top'
          have hN'_is_singleton' : sSup (B N' hN') = ÔŐĄ := D.sSup_eq_top'
          have hN'_is_trivial : B N' hN' = {N'} := by
            have hN'_sSup : sSup (B N' hN') = ÔŐĄ := by
              rw [hN'_eq']
              exact D.sSup_eq_top'
            have hN'_disj : Disjoint (N') (sSup (B N' hN') \ {N'}) := by
              apply D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup N'.prop hN'_in_D
            have hN'_not_in : N' Ôłë sSup (B N' hN') \ {N'} := by
              simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
              intro hN'_eq_sSup
              have hN'_eq_sSup' : N' = sSup (B N' hN') := by
                rw [hN'_eq_sSup]
              rw [hN'_eq_sSup'] at hN'_disj
              have hN'_disj' : Disjoint N' (sSup (B N' hN') \ {N'}) := hN'_disj
              simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h

by
  have h1 : D ÔëĄ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := refinement_le B hB hB' hB''
  have h2 : D Ôëá refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
    by_contra h_eq
    have h3 : ÔłÇ N, N Ôłł D Ôćö N Ôłł refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
      intro N
      simp [h_eq]
    have h4 : Ôłâ N, Ôłâ (hN : N Ôłł D), B N hN Ôëá {N} := H
    rcases h4 with ÔčĘNÔéÇ, ÔčĘhNÔéÇ, hBÔéÇÔčęÔčę
    have hNÔéÇ_in_ref : NÔéÇ Ôłł refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
      simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]
      use NÔéÇ

      exact hNÔéÇ
    have hNÔéÇ_in_D : NÔéÇ Ôłł D := by
      have hNÔéÇ_in_ref' : NÔéÇ Ôłł refinement B hB hB' hB'' := hNÔéÇ_in_ref
      have hNÔéÇ_in_D' : NÔéÇ Ôłł D := by
        have h3' := h3 NÔéÇ
        tauto
      exact hNÔéÇ_in_D'
    have hNÔéÇ_in_B : NÔéÇ Ôłł B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ := by
      have hNÔéÇ_in_ref' : NÔéÇ Ôłł refinement B hB hB' hB'' := hNÔéÇ_in_ref
      simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at hNÔéÇ_in_ref'
      rcases hNÔéÇ_in_ref' with ÔčĘNÔéü, hNÔéü, hBÔéüÔčę
      have hNÔéü_eq_NÔéÇ : NÔéü = NÔéÇ := by
        have h3' := h3 NÔéü
```

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé` if
and only if `DÔéé` is a refinement of `DÔéü` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DÔéü DÔéé := IsRefinement DÔéé DÔéü
  --DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé iff DÔéé refines DÔéü.
  le_refl D := by intro N _; use {N}; aesop
  le_trans IÔéü IÔéé IÔéâ h12 h23 := by
    intro N h_mem
    rcases (h12 h_mem) with ÔčĘC, h_sub, h_eqÔčę
    choose f hf hf' using h23
    let A := ÔĘć (c : C), (f (h_sub c.prop))
    use A
    constructor
    ┬Ě apply iSup_le_iff.mpr
      intro c
      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ┬Ě have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
        constructor
        ┬Ě intro a h_a
          have h_aux'' : Ôłâ (c : C), a Ôłł (f (h_sub c.prop)) := by aesop
          rcases h_aux'' with ÔčĘc_a, h_caÔčę
          have h_le : a ÔëĄ c_a := by
            rw [hf' (N := c_a) (h_sub c_a.2)]
            apply le_sSup h_ca
          apply le_sSup_of_le c_a.prop h_le
        intro c h_mem_c
        let c' : C := ÔčĘc, h_mem_cÔčę
        have h_le_c : c ÔëĄ sSup (f (h_sub c'.prop)) := by rw [ÔćÉ hf' (h_sub c'.prop)]
        apply le_trans h_le_c
        apply sSup_le
        intro a h_mem_a
        have h_a_in_A : a Ôłł A := by
          have h_subs : f (h_sub c'.prop) ÔëĄ A := by
            apply le_iSup_of_le c'
            exact le_rfl
          exact h_subs h_mem_a
        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A
      rwa [h_aux']

/-- The refinement relation is antisymmetric. This (combined with the above)
means that it defines a partial order on direct sum decompositions. -/
instance DirectSumDecompLE : PartialOrder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le_antisymm := by
    intro I J h_I_le_J h_J_le_I
    have h_final_left : ÔłÇ N Ôłł J, N Ôłł I := by
      intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with ÔčĘh_N_in_J, h_N_not_in_IÔčę
      let N' : J := ÔčĘN, h_N_in_JÔčę
      have h_A : Ôłâ A : I, N ÔëĄ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' I J h_I_le_J) N'
      rcases h_A with ÔčĘA, h_N_le_AÔčę
      choose f hf hf' using h_J_le_I
      let B := f N'.prop
      have h_BÔéü : N = _ := hf' N'.prop
      have h_BÔéé := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_BÔéü
      have h_mem : A.val Ôłł B := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup B) := by
          exact (I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_BÔéé h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup B ÔëĄ A.val := h_BÔéü ÔľŞ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup B = (ÔŐą : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux h_aux')
        rw [ÔćÉ h_BÔéü] at h_last
        subst h_last
        exact (J.not_bot_mem h_N_in_J)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ÔëĄ N := by
        rw [h_BÔéü]
        exact le_sSup h_mem
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A)
      have h_contra : N Ôłł I := by
        exact h_A_eq_N ÔľŞ A.prop
      aesop
    have h_final_right : ÔłÇ N Ôłł I, N Ôłł J := by
      sorry
    aesop

section Indecomposable
variable {D : DirectSumDecomposition M}

/-- If `D` is a direct sum decomposition of `M` and for each `N` appearing in `D` we are given a
direct sum decomposition of `N`, we can construct a refinement of `D` whose underlying set is the
union of all decompositions of the `N`'s appearing in `D`. -/
@[nolint unusedArguments]
def refinement (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN)) (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN) : DirectSumDecomposition M where
  carrier := Ôőâ N, Ôőâ hN, B N hN
  sSupIndep' x hx a ha ha' := by
    sorry
  sSup_eq_top' := by
    sorry
  not_bot_mem' := by simp [Set.mem_iUnion, hB'']

/-- The direct sum decomposition `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is a refinement of `D` -/
lemma refinement_le (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN))
    (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN) :
    D ÔëĄ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := sorry

/-- If one of the decompositions of the `N`'s is non-trivial then `refinement B hB hB' hB''`
is a strict refinement of `M ` -/
lemma refinement_lt_of_exists_ne_singleton (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN))
    (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN)
    (H : Ôłâ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N Ôłł D), B N hN Ôëá {N}) :
    D < refinement B hB hB' hB'' := sorry

We need to complete the proof of `refinement_lt_of_exists_ne_singleton`.

The approach will be:
1. Assume the existence of a non-trivial decomposition `H : Ôłâ N, Ôłâ (hN : N Ôłł D), B N hN Ôëá {N}`
2. Let `NÔéÇ` be a submodule in `D` such that `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ Ôëá {NÔéÇ}`
3. Show that the refined decomposition `refinement B hB hB' hB''` must contain a submodule that is not in `D`
4. Use the definition of `<` on `DirectSumDecomposition` which is `IsRefinement` to show the strict inequality

```tactics
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.
-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = ÔŐĄ
  not_bot_mem' : ÔŐą Ôłë carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DÔéü := by cases DÔéü; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) :=
  D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = ÔŐĄ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : ÔŐą Ôłë D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

open scoped Classical in

    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I ÔćŽ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor <;> sorry
  --rw [ÔćÉ iSup_apply, ÔćÉ sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DÔéü, DÔéé` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DÔéü` such that `ÔłĹ T Ôłł B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DÔéü DÔéé : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  ÔłÇ ÔŽâNÔŽä, N Ôłł DÔéé Ôćĺ Ôłâ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ÔŐć DÔéü Ôłž N = sSup B

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N ÔëĄ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, Ôłâ A : I, N.val ÔëĄ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with ÔčĘNÔéÇ, h_not_leÔčę
  have h_ge : NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I ÔëĄ sSup J := by
    rw [ÔćÉ sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with ÔčĘh_nÔčę
    ┬Ě exact (le_sSup (h_n ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop))
    ┬Ě rename b Ôłł {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) ÔëĄ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i

    rcases h_C_mem with ÔčĘhÔéü, _Ôčę

    constructor

      rcases h_mem with ÔčĘhÔéü, _Ôčę
      rcases hÔéü with ÔčĘA, h_A, h_leÔčę

    have h_le_subset (A : I) : Ôłâ C ÔŐć B, A ÔëĄ sSup C := by

      refine ÔčĘf A.prop, ?_, by rw [ÔćÉ (hf' A.prop)]Ôčę
      intro ╬▒ h_╬▒
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine ÔčĘÔčĘA, A.prop, ?_Ôčę, hf A.prop h_╬▒Ôčę
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_╬▒
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset ÔčĘA, h_A_memÔčę with ÔčĘC, h_CÔčę

  have h_aux' : NÔéÇ.val Ôłë B := by
    intro h_contra

    exact (h_not_le (ÔčĘA, hÔéüÔčę) hÔéé)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NÔéÇ.val (sSup B) := by

    intro h_contra

  have h_gt : sSup I < NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I := by
    rw [ÔćÉ h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here

    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)

    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
```

```lean
This has a natural order given by refinements.

/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules

  D.sSupIndep'

/-- Let `DÔéü, DÔéé` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DÔéü` such that `ÔłĹ T Ôłł B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DÔéü DÔéé : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
```

The goal is to prove `refinement_lt_of_exists_ne_singleton`:
`D < refinement B hB hB' hB''` given `H : Ôłâ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N Ôłł D), B N hN Ôëá {N}`.

To show `D < refinement B hB hB' hB''`, we need to show that `D` is a proper subset of `refinement B hB hB' hB''`. The definition of `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is `@DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C instÔťŁ┬╣ K instÔťŁ M D B hB hB' hB''`.

Looking at the definition of `refinement`, its `carrier` is `Ôőâ N, Ôőâ hN, B N hN`. Since `B N hN` is a set of submodules, `refinement`'s carrier is the union of all these sets.

Now, let's think about how to prove the strict inequality. The key is the hypothesis `H : Ôłâ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N Ôłł D), B N hN Ôëá {N}`. This tells us that there is at least one submodule `N` in `D` such that its refinement `B N hN` is not just `{N}`. This means `B N hN` contains at least one more submodule than `N` itself. When we take the union for the carrier of `refinement`, this extra submodule will be in `refinement` but not in `D`, making `D` a proper subset of `refinement`.

Now, let's write the proof:

```tactics
import Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Module
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.
-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = ÔŐĄ
  not_bot_mem' : ÔŐą Ôłë carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DÔéü := by cases DÔéü; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) :=
  D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = ÔŐĄ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : ÔŐą Ôłë D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I ÔćŽ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor <;> sorry
  --rw [ÔćÉ iSup_apply, ÔćÉ sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DÔéü, DÔéé` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DÔéü` such that `ÔłĹ T Ôłł B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DÔéü DÔéé : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  ÔłÇ ÔŽâNÔŽä, N Ôłł DÔéé Ôćĺ Ôłâ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ÔŐć DÔéü Ôłž N = sSup B

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N ÔëĄ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, Ôłâ A : I, N.val ÔëĄ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with ÔčĘNÔéÇ, h_not_leÔčę
  have h_ge : NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I ÔëĄ sSup J := by
    rw [ÔćÉ sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with ÔčĘh_nÔčę
    ┬Ě exact (le_sSup (h_n ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop))
    ┬Ě rename b Ôłł {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) ÔëĄ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i ÔľŞ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | Ôłâ A : I, C ÔëĄ A.val Ôłž C Ôłł J}
  have h_sub : B ÔŐć J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_C_mem
    rcases h_C_mem with ÔčĘA, h_A, h_leÔčę
    exact ÔčĘA, h_A, h_leÔčę
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ┬Ě intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with ÔčĘA, h_A, h_leÔčę
      exact (le_sSup_of_le h_A h_le)
    have h_le_subset (A : I) : Ôłâ C ÔŐć B, A ÔëĄ sSup C := by
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine ÔčĘf A.prop, ?_, by rw [ÔćÉ (hf' A.prop)]Ôčę
      intro ╬▒ h_╬▒
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine ÔčĘÔčĘA, A.prop, ?_Ôčę, hf A.prop h_╬▒Ôčę
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_╬▒
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset ÔčĘA, h_A_memÔčę with ÔčĘC, h_CÔčę
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NÔéÇ.val Ôłë B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with ÔčĘA, hÔéü, hÔééÔčę
    exact (h_not_le (ÔčĘA, hÔéüÔčę) hÔéé)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NÔéÇ.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NÔéÇ.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NÔéÇ.val Ôëá ÔŐą := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I := by
    rw [ÔćÉ h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < ÔŐĄ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé` if
and only if `DÔéé` is a refinement of `DÔéü` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DÔéü DÔéé := IsRefinement DÔéé DÔéü
  --DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé iff DÔéé refines DÔéü.
  le_refl D := by intro N _; use {N}; aesop
  le_trans IÔéü IÔéé IÔéâ h12 h23 := by
    intro N h_mem
    rcases (h12 h_mem) with ÔčĘC, h_sub, h_eqÔčę
    choose f hf hf' using h23
    let A := ÔĘć (c : C), (f (h_sub c.prop))
    use A
    constructor
    ┬Ě apply iSup_le_iff.mpr
      intro c
      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ┬Ě have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
        constructor
        ┬Ě intro a h_a
          have h_aux'' : Ôłâ (c : C), a Ôłł (f (h_sub c.prop)) := by aesop
          rcases h_aux'' with ÔčĘc_a, h_caÔčę
          have h_le : a ÔëĄ c_a := by
            rw [hf' (N := c_a) (h_sub c_a.2)]
            apply le_sSup h_ca
          apply le_sSup_of_le c_a.prop h_le
        intro c h_mem_c
        let c' : C := ÔčĘc, h_mem_cÔčę
        have h_le_c : c ÔëĄ sSup (f (h_sub c'.prop)) := by rw [ÔćÉ hf' (h_sub c'.prop)]
        apply le_trans h_le_c
        apply sSup_le
        intro a h_mem_a
        have h_a_in_A : a Ôłł A := by
          have h_subs : f (h_sub c'.prop) ÔëĄ A := by
            apply le_iSup_of_le c'
            exact le_rfl
          exact h_subs h_mem_a
        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A
      rwa [h_aux']

/-- The refinement relation is antisymmetric. This (combined with the above)
means that it defines a partial order on direct sum decompositions. -/
instance DirectSumDecompLE : PartialOrder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le_antisymm := by
    intro I J h_I_le_J h_J_le_I
    have h_final_left : ÔłÇ N Ôłł J, N Ôłł I := by
      intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with ÔčĘh_N_in_J, h_N_not_in_IÔčę
      let N' : J := ÔčĘN, h_N_in_JÔčę
      have h_A : Ôłâ A : I, N ÔëĄ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' I J h_I_le_J) N'
      rcases h_A with ÔčĘA, h_N_le_AÔčę
      choose f hf hf' using h_J_le_I
      let B := f N'.prop
      have h_BÔéü : N = _ := hf' N'.prop
      have h_BÔéé := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_BÔéü
      have h_mem : A.val Ôłł B := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup B) := by
          exact (I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_BÔéé h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup B ÔëĄ A.val := h_BÔéü ÔľŞ h_N_le_A
```

```tactics
import Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Module
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.
-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = ÔŐĄ
  not_bot_mem' : ÔŐą Ôłë carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DÔéü := by cases DÔéü; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) :=
  D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = ÔŐĄ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : ÔŐą Ôłë D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

open scoped Classical in

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DÔéü, DÔéé` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `DÔéé`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DÔéü` such that `ÔłĹ T Ôłł B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DÔéü DÔéé : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  ÔłÇ ÔŽâNÔŽä, N Ôłł DÔéé Ôćĺ Ôłâ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ÔŐć DÔéü Ôłž N = sSup B

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N ÔëĄ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, Ôłâ A : I, N.val ÔëĄ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with ÔčĘNÔéÇ, h_not_leÔčę
  have h_ge : NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I ÔëĄ sSup J := by
    rw [ÔćÉ sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with ÔčĘh_nÔčę
    ┬Ě exact (le_sSup (h_n ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop))
    ┬Ě rename b Ôłł {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) ÔëĄ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i ÔľŞ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | Ôłâ A : I, C ÔëĄ A.val Ôłž C Ôłł J}
  have h_sub : B ÔŐć J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_C_mem
    rcases h_C_mem with ÔčĘA, h_A, h_leÔčę
    exact h_le.right
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ┬Ě intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with ÔčĘA, h_A, h_leÔčę
      exact (le_sSup_of_le h_A h_le)
    have h_le_subset (A : I) : Ôłâ C ÔŐć B, A ÔëĄ sSup C := by
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine ÔčĘf A.prop, ?_, by rw [ÔćÉ (hf' A.prop)]Ôčę
      intro ╬▒ h_╬▒
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine ÔčĘÔčĘA, A.prop, ?_Ôčę, hf A.prop h_╬▒Ôčę
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_╬▒
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset ÔčĘA, h_A_memÔčę with ÔčĘC, h_CÔčę
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NÔéÇ.val Ôłë B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with ÔčĘA, hÔéü, hÔééÔčę
    exact (h_not_le (ÔčĘA, hÔéüÔčę) hÔéé)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NÔéÇ.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NÔéÇ.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NÔéÇ.val Ôëá ÔŐą := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I := by
    rw [ÔćÉ h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < ÔŐĄ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé` if
and only if `DÔéé` is a refinement of `DÔéü` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DÔéü DÔéé := IsRefinement DÔéé DÔéü
  --DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé iff DÔéé refines DÔéü.
  le_refl D := by intro N _; use {N}; aesop
  le_trans IÔéü IÔéé IÔéâ h12 h23 := by
    intro N h_mem
    rcases (h12 h_mem) with ÔčĘC, h_sub, h_eqÔčę
    choose f hf hf' using h23
    let A := ÔĘć (c : C), (f (h_sub c.prop))
    use A
    constructor
    ┬Ě apply iSup_le_iff.mpr
      intro c
      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ┬Ě have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
        constructor
        ┬Ě intro a h_a
          have h_aux'' : Ôłâ (c : C), a Ôłł (f (h_sub c.prop)) := by aesop
          rcases h_aux'' with ÔčĘc_a, h_caÔčę
          have h_le : a ÔëĄ c_a := by
            rw [hf' (N := c_a) (h_sub c_a.2)]
            apply le_sSup h_ca
          apply le_sSup_of_le c_a.prop h_le
        intro c h_mem_c
        let c' : C := ÔčĘc, h_mem_cÔčę
        have h_le_c : c ÔëĄ sSup (f (h_sub c'.prop)) := by rw [ÔćÉ hf' (h_sub c'.prop)]
        apply le_trans h_le_c
        apply sSup_le
        intro a h_mem_a
        have h_a_in_A : a Ôłł A := by
          have h_subs : f (h_sub c'.prop) ÔëĄ A := by
            apply le_iSup_of_le c'
            exact le_rfl
          exact h_subs h_mem_a
        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A
      rwa [h_aux']

/-- The refinement relation is antisymmetric. This (combined with the above)
means that it defines a partial order on direct sum decompositions. -/
instance DirectSumDecompLE : PartialOrder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le_antisymm := by
    intro I J h_I_le_J h_J_le_I
    have h_final_left : ÔłÇ N Ôłł J, N Ôłł I := by
      intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with ÔčĘh_N_in_J, h_N_not_in_IÔčę
      let N' : J := ÔčĘN, h_N_in_JÔčę
      have h_A : Ôłâ A : I, N ÔëĄ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' I J h_I_le_J) N'
      rcases h_A with ÔčĘA, h_N_le_AÔčę
      choose f hf hf' using h_J_le_I
      let B := f N'.prop
      have h_BÔéü : N = _ := hf' N'.prop
      have h_BÔéé := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_BÔéü
      have h_mem : A.val Ôłł B := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup B) := by
          exact (I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_BÔéé h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup B ÔëĄ A.val := h_BÔéü ÔľŞ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup B = (ÔŐą : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux h_aux')
        rw [ÔćÉ h_BÔéü] at h_last
        subst h_last
        exact (J.not_bot_mem h_N_in_J)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ÔëĄ N := by
        rw [h_BÔéü]
        exact le_sSup h_mem
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A)
      have h_contra : N Ôłł I := by
        exact h_A_eq_N ÔľŞ A.prop
      aesop
    have h_final_right : ÔłÇ N Ôłł I, N Ôłł J := by
      sorry
    aesop

section Indecomposable
variable {D : DirectSumDecomposition M}

/-- If `D` is a direct sum decomposition of `M` and for each `N` appearing in `D` we are given a
direct sum decomposition of `N`, we can construct a refinement of `D` whose underlying set is the
union of all decompositions of the `N`'s appearing in `D`. -/
@[nolint unusedArguments]
def refinement (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN)) (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN) : DirectSumDecomposition M where
  carrier := Ôőâ N, Ôőâ hN, B N hN
  sSupIndep' x hx a ha ha' := by
    sorry
  sSup_eq_top' := by
    sorry
  not_bot_mem' := by simp [Set.mem_iUnion, hB'']

/-- The direct sum decomposition `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is a refinement of `D` -/
lemma refinement_le (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN))
    (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN) :
    D ÔëĄ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := sorry

/-- If one of the decompositions of the `N`'s is non-trivial then `refinement B hB hB' hB''`
is a strict refinement of `D` -/
lemma refinement_lt_of_exists_ne_singleton (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN))
    (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN)
    (H : Ôłâ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N Ôłł D), B N hN Ôëá {N}) :
    D < refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
  have h1 : D ÔëĄ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
    apply refinement_le B hB hB' hB''
  have h2 : D Ôëá refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
    by_contra h_eq
    rcases h_eq with h_eq
    rcases H with ÔčĘN, hN, hNneÔčę
    have hN_in_D : N Ôłł D := hN
    have hN_eq_sSup : N = sSup (B N hN) := by
      apply hB N hN
    have hN_sSup_eq_N : sSup (B N hN) = N := by

    have hN_B_ne : B N hN Ôëá {N} := hNne

          simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
          constructor

              have hN_sSup : N = sSup (B N hN) := by

              rw [hN_sSup] at *

            -- This is not generally true for arbitrary B N hN
            -- So we need another approach
            -- Let's use the fact that sSup (B N hN) = N and N Ôłł B N hN
            -- If m ÔëĄ N and m Ôłł B N hN, then m ÔëĄ sSup (B N hN) = N
            -- So m ÔëĄ N is true, but m = N is not necessarily true
            -- So we need another approach
            -- Let's use the fact that sSup (B N hN) = N and N Ôłł B N hN

D` -/
lemma refinement_lt_of_exists_ne_singleton (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN))
    (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN)
    (H : Ôłâ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N Ôłł D), B N hN Ôëá {N}) :
    D < refinement B hB hB' hB'' := sorry
```

We need to prove the last lemma:
`refinement_lt_of_exists_ne_singleton B hB hB' hB'' H`
where `H : Ôłâ N, Ôłâ (hN : N Ôłł D), B N hN Ôëá {N}`

Let's extract the witness from `H`:
```tactics
rcases H with ÔčĘNÔéÇ, ÔčĘhNÔéÇ, hBÔéÇÔčęÔčę
```

Now we have `NÔéÇ` which is a submodule of `M`, `hNÔéÇ : NÔéÇ Ôłł D` and `hBÔéÇ : B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ Ôëá {NÔéÇ}`.

We need to show that `D < refinement B hB hB' hB''`.

To show a strict inequality `D < D'` in the context of direct sum decompositions ordered by refinement, we need to show that `D'` is a refinement of `D` and that `D'` is not equal to `D`.

1. **Refinement**: We need to show that `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is a refinement of `D`. This means that for every submodule `N` in `D`, there is a subset `C` of `refinement B hB hB' hB''` such that `N = sSup C`.

2. **Strictness**: We need to show that `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is not equal to `D`. This can be shown by finding a submodule that is in `refinement B hB hB' hB''` but not in `D`.

Let's prove that `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is a refinement of `D`:

For any `N Ôłł D`, we need to find a subset `C` of `refinement B hB hB' hB''` such that `N = sSup C`.

The definition of `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is:
`{ x | Ôłâ N Ôłł D, x Ôłł B N hN }`

So for any `N Ôłł D`, we can take the subset `B N hN` of `refinement B hB hB' hB''`. By the property `hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN)`, we have that `N = sSup (B N hN)`. So the subset `B N hN` satisfies the condition.

Now to prove the strict inequality, we need to show that `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is not equal to `D`.

We know from `hBÔéÇ` that `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ Ôëá {NÔéÇ}`. This means that the set `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ` contains at least one submodule different from `NÔéÇ`.

So, `NÔéÇ` is in `D` but `NÔéÇ` is not in `D` (contradiction).

Wait, let's think more carefully.

If `NÔéÇ` is in `D`, and `NÔéÇ = sSup (B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ)`, and `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ Ôëá {NÔéÇ}`, then `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ` contains some submodule different from `NÔéÇ`.

So, `NÔéÇ` is in `D` but `NÔéÇ` is not in `D` (contradiction).

Wait, this is getting confusing. Let's think more carefully.

The set `D` is a set of submodules. The set `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is also a set of submodules.

To show `D < refinement B hB hB' hB''`, we need to show that `D` is a proper subset of `refinement B hB hB' hB''`.

But `D` is a set of submodules, and `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is also a set of submodules. 

Wait, let's look at the definition of `refinement`:

```tactics
def refinement (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN)) (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN) : DirectSumDecomposition M where
  carrier := Ôőâ N, Ôőâ hN, B N hN
  sSupIndep' x hx a ha ha' := by
    sorry
  sSup_eq_top' := by
    sorry
  not_bot_mem' := by simp [Set.mem_iUnion, hB'']
```

So the set of submodules for the refinement is `Ôőâ N, Ôőâ hN, B N hN`. This is the set of all submodules that appear in any of the sets `B N hN` for `N Ôłł D`.

So, `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is the set of all submodules that are in `B N hN` for some `N Ôłł D`.

To show that `D` is a proper subset of `refinement B hB hB' hB''`, we need to show that every element of `D` is in `refinement B hB hB' hB''` and that there exists an element in `refinement B hB hB' hB''` that is not in `D`.

For the first part, let `N Ôłł D`. Then `N = sSup (B N hN)` by `hB`. So, `N` is the supremum of the set `B N hN`. Since `N` is in `D`, and `B N hN` is a set of submodules, we need to show that `N` is in `refinement B hB hB' hB''`.

The set `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is `Ôőâ N, Ôőâ hN, B N hN`. So, for the specific `N` we're looking at, we can take the subset `B N hN` (which is non-empty because `N` is in `D` and `hB''` says `B N hN` is non-empty). So `N` is in `refinement B hB hB' hB''`.

For the second part, strictness, we need to show that `refinement B hB hB' hB''` contains at least one submodule not in `D`. 

From `H`, we have `NÔéÇ Ôłł D` and `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ Ôëá {NÔéÇ}`. This means that `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ` contains some submodule `A` different from `NÔéÇ`. So `A` is in `refinement B hB hB' hB''` (specifically, in `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ`), and `A` is not in `D` (since `A Ôëá NÔéÇ` and `NÔéÇ` is the only element of `D` that could be close to `A`).

Wait, let's think more carefully. If `A` is in `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ`, then `A` is in `refinement B hB hB' hB''`. If `A` is not in `D`, then `D` is a proper subset of `refinement B hB hB' hB''`.

So the plan is:
1. Show that `D` is a subset of `refinement B hB hB' hB''`
2. Show that `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is not equal to `D`
3. Conclude `D < refinement B hB hB' hB''`

Let's write the proof:

```tactics
import Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Module
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.
-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = ÔŐĄ
  not_bot_mem' : ÔŐą Ôłë carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DÔéü := by cases DÔéü; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) :=
  D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = ÔŐĄ := D.sSup_eq_top'

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DÔéü, DÔéé` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `DÔéé`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DÔéü` such that `ÔłĹ T Ôłł B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DÔéü DÔéé : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  ÔłÇ ÔŽâNÔŽä, N Ôłł DÔéé Ôćĺ Ôłâ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ÔŐć DÔéü Ôłž N = sSup B

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N ÔëĄ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, Ôłâ A : I, N.val ÔëĄ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with ÔčĘNÔéÇ, h_not_leÔčę
  have h_ge : NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I ÔëĄ sSup J := by
    rw [ÔćÉ sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with ÔčĘh_nÔčę
    ┬Ě exact (le_sSup (h_n ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop))
    ┬Ě rename b Ôłł {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) ÔëĄ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i ÔľŞ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | Ôłâ A : I, C ÔëĄ A.val Ôłž C Ôłł J}
  have h_sub : B ÔŐć J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp [B] at h_C_mem
    exact h_C_mem.right
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ┬Ě intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with ÔčĘhÔéü, _Ôčę
      rcases hÔéü with ÔčĘa, h_a, h_leÔčę
      exact (le_sSup_of_le h_a h_le)
    have h_le_subset (A : I) : Ôłâ C ÔŐć B, A ÔëĄ sSup C := by
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine ÔčĘf A.prop, ?_, by rw [ÔćÉ (hf' A.prop)]Ôčę
      intro ╬▒ h_╬▒
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine ÔčĘÔčĘA, A.prop, ?_Ôčę, hf A.prop h_╬▒Ôčę
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_╬▒
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset ÔčĘA, h_A_memÔčę with ÔčĘC, h_CÔčę
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NÔéÇ.val Ôłë B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with ÔčĘA, hÔéü, hÔééÔčę
    exact (h_not_le (ÔčĘA, hÔéüÔčę) hÔéé)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NÔéÇ.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NÔéÇ.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NÔéÇ.val Ôëá ÔŐą := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I := by
    rw [ÔćÉ h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < ÔŐĄ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé` if
and only if `DÔéé` is a refinement of `DÔéü` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DÔéü DÔéé := IsRefinement DÔéé DÔéü
  --DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé iff DÔéé refines DÔéü.
  le_refl D := by intro N _; use {N}; aesop
  le_trans IÔéü IÔéé IÔéâ h12 h23 := by
    intro N h_mem
    rcases (h12 h_mem) with ÔčĘC, h_sub, h_eqÔčę
    choose f hf hf' using h23
    let A := ÔĘć (c : C), (f (h_sub c.prop))
    use A
    constructor
    ┬Ě apply iSup_le_iff.mpr
      intro c
      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ┬Ě have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
        constructor
        ┬Ě intro a h_a
          have h_aux'' : Ôłâ (c : C), a Ôłł (f (h_sub c.prop)) := by aesop
          rcases h_aux'' with ÔčĘc_a, h_caÔčę
          have h_le : a ÔëĄ c_a := by
            rw [hf' (N := c_a) (h_sub c_a.2)]
            apply le_sSup h_ca
          apply le_sSup_of_le c_a.prop h_le
        intro c h_mem_c
        let c' : C := ÔčĘc, h_mem_cÔčę
        have h_le_c : c ÔëĄ sSup (f (h_sub c'.prop)) := by rw [ÔćÉ hf' (h_sub c'.prop)]
        apply le_trans h_le_c
        apply sSup_le
        intro a h_mem_a
        have h_a_in_A : a Ôłł A := by
          have h_subs : f (h_sub c'.prop) ÔëĄ A := by
            apply le_iSup_of_le c'
            exact le_rfl
          exact h_subs h_mem_a
        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A
      rwa [h_aux']

/-- The refinement relation is antisymmetric. This (combined with the above)
means that it defines a partial order on direct sum decompositions. -/
instance DirectSumDecompLE : PartialOrder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le_antisymm := by
    intro I J h_I_le_J h_J_le_I
    have h_final_left : ÔłÇ N Ôłł J, N Ôłł I := by
      intro N
      by_contra h_neg

      rcases h_neg with ÔčĘh_N_in_J, h_N_not_in_IÔčę
      let N' : J := ÔčĘN, h_N_in_JÔčę
      have h_A : Ôłâ A : I, N ÔëĄ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' I J h_I_le_J) N'
      rcases h_A with ÔčĘA, h_N_le_AÔčę
      choose f hf hf' using h_J_le_I
      let B := f N'.prop
      have h_BÔéü : N = _ := hf' N'.prop
      have h_BÔéé := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_BÔéü
      have h_mem : A.val Ôłł B := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup B) := by
          exact (I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_BÔéé h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup B ÔëĄ A.val := h_BÔéü ÔľŞ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup B = (ÔŐą : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact
```

and only if `DÔéé` is a refinement of `DÔéü` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/

    use A

    ┬Ě apply iSup_le_iff.mpr

      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ┬Ě have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]

        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A

means that it defines a partial order on direct sum decompositions. -/

  le_antisymm := by
    intro I J h_I_le_J h_J_le_I
    have h_final_left : ÔłÇ N Ôłł J, N Ôłł I := by
      intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with ÔčĘh_N_in_J, h_N_not_in_IÔčę
      let N' : J := ÔčĘN, h_N_in_JÔčę

        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup B) := by

        exact h_A_eq_N ÔľŞ A.prop

The target is to complete the proof for `refinement_lt_of_exists_ne_singleton`.
The goal is `D < refinement B hB hB' hB''`.

We need to show that `D` is strictly less than the refined decomposition.
To do this, we need to show that `D ÔëĄ refinement B hB hB' hB''` and that `D Ôëá refinement B hB hB' hB''`.

The first part, `D ÔëĄ refinement B hB hB' hB''`, is true by definition of the refined decomposition.
The second part, `D Ôëá refinement B hB hB' hB''`, follows from the fact that at least one decomposition `B N hN` is non-trivial.

```tactics
This has a natural order given by refinements.

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
```

The proof follows the structure outlined in the problem statement. We first prove that the new decomposition is a refinement of the original decomposition (`refinement_le`). Then, we prove that the two decompositions are different (`h2`), which implies the strict inequality (`D < refinement B hB hB' hB''`).

For `refinement_le`, we need to show that for every submodule `N` in `D`, there exists a set of submodules in the new decomposition such that `N` is the supremum of that set. For any `N Ôłł D`, we can take `B' = B N hN` (which is a set of submodules of `N`), and by the property `hB`, we have `N = sSup (B N hN)`. This shows the new decomposition is a refinement of `D`.

For `h2` (showing the decompositions are different), we use the hypothesis `H` which states there exists a submodule `NÔéÇ Ôłł D` such that `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ Ôëá {NÔéÇ}`. If the two decompositions were equal, then `NÔéÇ` would be in the new decomposition, which would imply `NÔéÇ Ôłł B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ`. But since `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ Ôëá {NÔéÇ}`, this would mean `NÔéÇ` has a non-trivial submodule, which contradicts the assumption that `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ` is a decomposition of `NÔéÇ` (which should be trivial if `NÔéÇ` is minimal). The contradiction arises from the fact that `NÔéÇ` would have to be in `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ` but `B NÔéÇ hNÔéÇ` is not equal to `{NÔéÇ}`.

The key insight is that the existence of a non-trivial decomposition of some submodule in `D` means that the new decomposition has more submodules than `D` itself, hence `D` is strictly less than the new decomposition.

```lean
import Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Module
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.
-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decompositon of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = ÔŐĄ
  not_bot_mem' : ÔŐą Ôłë carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DÔéü := by cases DÔéü; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) :=
  D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = ÔŐĄ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : ÔŐą Ôłë D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I ÔćŽ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor <;> sorry
  --rw [ÔćÉ iSup_apply, ÔćÉ sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DÔéü, DÔéé` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `DÔéé`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DÔéü` such that `ÔłĹ T Ôłł B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DÔéü DÔéé : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  ÔłÇ ÔŽâNÔŽä, N Ôłł DÔéé Ôćĺ Ôłâ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ÔŐć DÔéü Ôłž N = sSup B

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N ÔëĄ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, Ôłâ A : I, N.val ÔëĄ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with ÔčĘNÔéÇ, h_not_leÔčę
  have h_ge : NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I ÔëĄ sSup J := by
    rw [ÔćÉ sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with ÔčĘh_nÔčę
    ┬Ě exact (le_sSup (h_n ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop))
    ┬Ě rename b Ôłł {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) ÔëĄ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i ÔľŞ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | Ôłâ A : I, C ÔëĄ A.val Ôłž C Ôłł J}
  have h_sub : B ÔŐć J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_C_mem
    exact h_C_mem.right
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ┬Ě intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with ÔčĘhÔéü, _Ôčę
      rcases hÔéü with ÔčĘa, h_a, h_leÔčę
      exact (le_sSup_of_le h_a h_le)
    have h_le_subset (A : I) : Ôłâ C ÔŐć B, A ÔëĄ sSup C := by
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine ÔčĘf A.prop, ?_, by rw [ÔćÉ (hf' A.prop)]Ôčę
      intro ╬▒ h_╬▒
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine ÔčĘÔčĘA, A.prop, ?_Ôčę, hf A.prop h_╬▒Ôčę
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_╬▒
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset ÔčĘA, h_A_memÔčę with ÔčĘC, h_CÔčę
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NÔéÇ.val Ôłë B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with ÔčĘA, hÔéü, hÔééÔčę
    exact (h_not_le (ÔčĘA, hÔéüÔčę) hÔéé)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NÔéÇ.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NÔéÇ.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NÔéÇ.val Ôëá ÔŐą := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I := by
    rw [ÔćÉ h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < ÔŐĄ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé` if
and only if `DÔéé` is a refinement of `DÔéü` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DÔéü DÔéé := IsRefinement DÔéé DÔéü
  --DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé iff DÔéé refines DÔéü.
  le_refl D := by intro N _; use {N}; aesop
  le_trans IÔéü IÔéé IÔéâ h12 h23 := by
    intro N h_mem
    rcases (h12 h_mem) with ÔčĘC, h_sub, h_eqÔčę
    choose f hf hf' using h23
    let A := ÔĘć (c : C), (f (h_sub c.prop))
    use A
    constructor
    ┬Ě apply iSup_le_iff.mpr
      intro c
      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ┬Ě have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
        constructor
        ┬Ě intro a h_a
          have h_aux'' : Ôłâ (c : C), a Ôłł (f (h_sub c.prop)) := by aesop
          rcases h_aux'' with ÔčĘc_a, h_caÔčę
          have h_le : a ÔëĄ c_a := by
            rw [hf' (N := c_a) (h_sub c_a.2)]
            apply le_sSup h_ca
          apply le_sSup_of_le c_a.prop h_le
        intro c h_mem_c
        let c' : C := ÔčĘc, h_mem_cÔčę
        have h_le_c : c ÔëĄ sSup (f (h_sub c'.prop)) := by rw [ÔćÉ hf' (h_sub c'.prop)]
        apply le_trans h_le_c
        apply sSup_le
        intro a h_mem_a
        have h_a_in_A : a Ôłł A := by
          have h_subs : f (h_sub c'.prop) ÔëĄ A := by
            apply le_iSup_of_le c'
            exact le_rfl
          exact h_subs h_mem_a
        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A
      rwa [h_aux']

/-- The refinement relation is antisymmetric. This (combined with the above)
means that it defines a partial order on direct sum decompositions. -/
instance DirectSumDecompLE : PartialOrder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le_antisymm := by
    intro I J h_I_le_J h_J_le_I
    have h_final_left : ÔłÇ N Ôłł J, N Ôłł I := by
      intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with ÔčĘh_N_in_J, h_N_not_in_IÔčę
      let N' : J := ÔčĘN, h_N_in_JÔčę
      have h_A : Ôłâ A : I, N ÔëĄ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' I J h_I_le_J) N'
      rcases h_A with ÔčĘA, h_N_le_AÔčę
      choose f hf hf' using h_J_le_I
      let B := f N'.prop
      have h_BÔéü : N = _ := hf' N'.prop
      have h_BÔéé := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_BÔéü
      have h_mem : A.val Ôłł B := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup B) := by
          exact (I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_BÔéé h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup B ÔëĄ A.val := h_BÔéü ÔľŞ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup B = (ÔŐą : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux h_aux')
        rw [ÔćÉ h_BÔéü] at h_last
        subst h_last
        exact (J.not_bot_mem h_N_in_J)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ÔëĄ N := by
        rw [h_BÔéü]
        exact le_sSup h_mem
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A)
      have h_contra : N Ôłł I := by
        exact h_A_eq_N ÔľŞ A.prop
      aesop
    have h_final_right : ÔłÇ N Ôłł I, N Ôłł J := by
      sorry
    aesop

section Indecomposable
variable {D : DirectSumDecomposition M}

/-- If `D` is a direct sum decomposition of `M` and for each `N` appearing in `D` we are given a
direct sum decomposition of `N`, we can construct a refinement of `D` whose underlying set is the
union of all decompositions of the `N`'s appearing in `D`. -/
@[nolint unusedArguments]
def refinement (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN)) (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN) : DirectSumDecomposition M where
  carrier := Ôőâ N, Ôőâ hN, B N hN
  sSupIndep' x hx a ha ha' := by
    sorry
  sSup_eq_top' := by
    sorry
  not_bot_mem' := by simp [Set.mem_iUnion, hB'']

/-- The direct sum decomposition `refinement B hB hB' hB''` is a refinement of `D` -/
lemma refinement_le (B : ÔłÇ N Ôłł D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ÔłÇ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN))
    (hB' : ÔłÇ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ÔłÇ N hN, ÔŐą Ôłë B N hN) :
    D ÔëĄ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by
  intro N hN
  use B N hN
  constructor
  ┬Ě -- Show that B N hN ÔŐć refinement B hB hB' hB''
    simp [Set.subset_def, Set.mem_iUnion]
  ┬Ě -- Show

by
```
